game_name: Heroes of Might and Magic III

sub_pixel_system.notes: Turn-based strategy game with hexagonal grid-based movement; sub-pixel precision not applicable to this genre

special_mechanics.name: Hexagonal Grid Movement
special_mechanics.description: Combat occurs on a hexagonal grid where units move, attack, and cast spells. Movement is turn-based rather than real-time physics-based.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Heroes of Might and Magic III is a turn-based strategy-RPG with no real-time physics mechanics. Movement is entirely grid-based on hexagonal tiles. No gravity, jump physics, or movement speed parameters exist in the traditional sense. This game does not have platformer/action game physics.
